Engineering the Future

I'm Kannan Selvam,
Designing Smart Solutions.

Building the next generation of technology using AI, Embedded Systems, and Innovative Hardware Solutions.

View Projects

About Me

As an Electronics & Communication Engineering scholar, I am driven to seamlessly integrate intelligent software with robust hardware. Operating at the nexus of AI, IoT, Embedded Systems, and VLSI Design, I aim to engineer sustainable solutions for complex global challenges. I believe true innovation transcends code and requires visionary leadership, continuous learning, and active community engagement. This philosophy fuels my success in premier hackathons and my leadership roles as an ISRO Student Ambassador, a GDG contributor, and a technical mentor. With a global mindset, my ultimate goal is to harness deep tech to architect intelligent systems that drive meaningful progress.

Featured Projects

AI & Sustainability

Crop IQ – Smart Agriculture Planning

An AI-driven decision support system to optimize agricultural planning. Utilizing data from multi-point soil sensors and weather APIs, Crop IQ provides site-specific crop recommendations to maximize yield and minimize resource waste.

Arduino AI/ML IoT
AI & Full-Stack

AI-Powered EDA Assistant

An intelligent software platform designed to revolutionize electronic circuit design, analysis, and validation. Serving as a virtual design assistant, it transforms complex circuit requirements into optimized, AI-driven solutions.

React FastAPI Gemini

Network Design Workshop

Draupathi IT Solutions

Covered key topics like network topologies, IP addressing, subnetting, and basic network security.

Mega SVEEP & World Record

World Records Union | Paavai Institutions

Participated in a historic Mega SVEEP event with 8,662 participants to create a massive human formation promoting voter awareness and civic responsibility. This achievement was officially recognized by the World Records Union.

Conducted an engaging technical session on Arduino for juniors, covering the basics of components and real-time applications in electronics and IoT to inspire future hardware innovations.

Secured a Top 10 spot with Team TECH BINDERS to enter the Grand Finale. Built a weather-adaptive AI platform for risk-aware crop decisions with offline-first features.

Selected for the National Level Hackathon at the India Tech Summit 2026. Presented 'Crop IQ', an AI-driven agricultural decision intelligence platform designed to support farmers with smart recommendations and planning.

National Level Srinivasa Ramanujan Mathematical Competitions

ISTE Tamil Nadu Section
